transcript.text: Hello, Living in Boulder V-Log for the 13th of January 2014.
I'm really tired now, which is good, so I can get to sleep, because it's 9, 10 p.m.
I became a diurnalist again yesterday, and then today, I got up at, like, crack of dawn
Or something like that, and yeah, I was working on my site there and riding on the bike for,
I don't know, an hour or so, and then I called my mom just to see if she needed any help,
And yeah, I went over there and helped her take inventory and do other stuff for a few
Hours.
Oh, and drive her around.
She can't drive.
And then came back here, and I went to finish Despicable Me too, because I didn't finish
It last night, because I passed out.
That was funny.
Um, I'm kind of high right now on some weed I had tucked away.
Um, and, uh, yeah, I felt pretty good this morning, um, while I was riding on the bike
And being a diurnalist, being a diurnalist is a lot healthier than being a nocturnalist.
Um, yeah, it gets kind of depressing when you're up at night, and you're like, you know,
I don't know how you feel, but during the day, it's, it's, it's way cooler, way more fun.
So, yeah, I'm going to avoid being a nocturnalist from now on.
Uh, and, uh, yeah, so I can start working and riding on the bike there.
Uh, I, I feel like I'm kind of, um, uh, gaining weight.
I can feel the ripples of fat when I'm laying down, so, yeah, I definitely should start riding.
I ran out of crickets a couple days ago.
Um, I can't remember, it didn't look exactly how long they lasted.
When I get the other ones in the mail, I'll tally it up.

I'm throwing them in with the freeze-dried mealworms, so sometimes they accidentally eat the freeze-dried,
But yesterday was the first time, or maybe it was today.
Yeah, today was the first time I actually, actually, fed, hand-fed my gecko.
So I'm going to start doing that a lot with the freeze-dried mealworm.
Just put it, and then they eat it right out of my hand, and, and, uh, and then try to pick him up.
Well, I just put my hand in front of him, and he jumped over it, uh, to go get into his little hideaway.
So, yeah, I'm going to do that.
Oh, look, they're coming out now.
They just came out.
Both of them at the same time.
They're little buddies.
He's going to knock that over.
